source_discovery_method: fetch public board HTML and parse validated cards/links only
list_fetch_method: bounded HTML list fetch through source runner
detail_fetch_method: detail page required when list cards omit location/remote; use only fixture-backed extractors. Use req-only detail for normal rows, but preserve req_loc first when the same base req appears on multiple canonical URLs and req_loc exposes labeled Location. Optional RSS feed fetch supplies posting dates when item link or guid values expose matching base req ids. Labeled detail Date Posted/Posted Date/Posting Date/Open Date values supply posting dates only when list and RSS dates are absent. Exact table.viewFields Location Remote/Hybrid labels, exact #LI-Remote/#LI-Hybrid detail tags, and detail body Location labels that directly say remote/hybrid role supply remote evidence; detail body Location labels that contain a US street address, city, state, and ZIP supply City, ST geo evidence. Generic title/body remote prose does not. Stale or removed detail pages stay quarantined with detail_404_or_410 instead of inventing geo/remote evidence.
pagination_method: only follow known next-page/list links with max-page and max-row limits
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: HRMDirect URL identity: use req for normal rows; use req:req_loc when the same req appears on multiple canonical URLs so each posting remains indexable. RSS date matching stays keyed by base req.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: detail-page: List cards may omit geo; detail fixture decides whether req-only or duplicate-req req_loc detail fetch is required. List city values such as Remote - Colorado or Remote, Continental U.S. are treated as remote-scope location evidence without storing Remote as a city. Exact detail Location Remote/Hybrid labels are remote evidence, not geo/location evidence. Exact US state abbreviations from list td.state or detail Location are not published as cities.
country_region_city_rule: detail-page: List cards may omit geo; detail fixture decides whether req-only or duplicate-req req_loc detail fetch is required. Exact full-state, Canadian province, and country Office values are accepted only from labeled detail HTML. Exact US state abbreviations from list td.state or detail Location prove United States country but do not invent a city. Detail body Location labels are accepted as geo only when the value is a US street address with city, state, and ZIP, and only City, ST is stored.
remote_type_rule: explicit-source-evidence: preserve source-backed onsite, remote, and hybrid values, accept td.cities values that start with Remote/Hybrid as list remote-scope evidence, accept exact table.viewFields Location Remote/Hybrid labels, accept exact detail #LI-Remote/#LI-Hybrid tags, and accept detail body Location labels that directly say remote/hybrid role; only explicit remote/hybrid can satisfy the no-geo public gate, while title-only Remote/Virtual text and generic body prose stay quarantined.
posting_date_rule: list td.date/td.dates is strongest; HRMDirect rss.php?search=true item pubDate is accepted only when the item link or guid exposes a matching req id; labeled detail Date Posted/Posted Date/Posting Date/Open Date is accepted only when list and RSS dates are absent.
rate_limit: strict host serialization, jitter, retry cap, and high block-rate stop

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: accepted rows must pass title/company/canonical_url and row-level quality gate; onsite without useful geo remains quarantined

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: run bounded source refresh after deployment to populate list/RSS/detail posting_date evidence, duplicate-req req:req_loc source ids, and req_loc detail location evidence, then inspect remaining no_geo_no_remote quarantines including source-backed onsite rows without useful geo
certification_blockers: production rows need refresh; remaining quarantines require source-labeled geo or explicit remote/hybrid evidence rather than title/body/onsite inference
